name: ruby-cms-scanner
title: ruby-cms-scanner
description:
CMS Scanner Framework
This package provides a quick and easy way to create a CMS/WebSite Scanner by
acting like a Framework and providing classes, formatters etc.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-cms-scanner because CMS Scanner Framework.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-cms-scanner as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-cms-scanner with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-cms-scanner --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
